titles: "같은 수익 4,800만인데 1,000만 냈다" 박대리가 세금으로 날린 돈 — 해외 ETF 절세 공식 25분 총정리
해외 직투 22% vs 국내 상장 15.4% — 세금 폭탄 맞는 사람이 반드시 놓친 5가지
ISA·연금저축·IRP 3단 공식으로 매년 178만 원 돌려받는 법 (ep10 세금 마스터)

character_poses.1: INTRO-01 노트필기 — 분석가 똑똑이가 해외 ETF 세금 항목 메모 분석
character_poses.2: REACT-06 기쁨/호재 — 178만원 환급 봉투 들고 환호, 별·반짝이
character_poses.3: INTRO-05 정면 응시 + 손짓 — 22% vs 15.4% 갈림길 안내

meta.design_rule: 상단 47% 이미지 + 하단 53% 순검정 (미리캔버스 노랑 2줄 텍스트 자리). 스컹크 벡터 스타일. 말풍선 라벨 자리는 이미지 상단 좌우 여백에 확보.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 1 — 스컹크 노트필기(INTRO-01). 좌측 정장+안경 똑똑이가 책상에서 노트에 메모하며 진지한 표정. 우측에 황금 동전 더미(4,800) 위로 빨간 세금 칼날이 비스듬히 베어 작은 빨간 동전 더미(1,000)가 떨어져 나가는 시각화. 두 더미 사이 빨간 화살표. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes behind small round glasses, small pink nose, focused serious analyst expression, wearing a tiny dark navy business suit with red tie, sitting at a small desk holding a notebook with one paw, the other paw writing with a pencil, brow slightly furrowed in concentration. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, half body shot. On the RIGHT side: a large pile of glowing golden coins, with a stylized red tax blade angled diagonally cutting across, slicing a smaller pile of red-tinted coins away from the main pile. A bold red arrow points from the main pile toward the smaller separated pile, indicating tax extraction. Floating crimson warning particles surround the cut. Background: deep navy blue gradient with subtle red warning glow and faint financial grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with strong red warning atmosphere.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 2 — 스컹크 기쁨/호재(REACT-06). 중앙 똑똑이가 양손 들어 환호, 행복한 큰 미소, 주변에 작은 별과 반짝이. 한 손에는 황금 환급 봉투, 다른 손에는 작은 3종 통장 카드 묶음(연금·IRP·ISA). 봉투 위로 황금 후광. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes with happy sparkles, small pink nose, big joyful smile with slightly open mouth. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk stands in the CENTER of the upper frame, full body shot, both paws raised in celebration with small bright stars and sparkle particles scattered around. In one raised paw, a glowing golden refund envelope with sparkles emanating; in the other raised paw, a small bundle of three bankbook cards stacked together representing pension, IRP, and ISA accounts. A warm golden halo surrounds the envelope. Background: deep navy blue gradient with golden bokeh sparkles, confetti-like particles, and a soft radial glow. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-left corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with celebratory gold aesthetic.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 3 — 스컹크 정면 응시 + 안내 손짓(INTRO-05). 좌측 똑똑이가 정면 보며 따뜻한 미소로 한 손 앞으로 안내. 우측에 두 갈래 길 — 좌측 좁은 길은 빨간 22% 표지판이 길을 막음, 우측 넓은 길은 황금 15.4% 표지판과 함께 펼쳐짐. 갈림길 표지판 위로 황금 후광. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes looking directly at the viewer with a warm confident smile, small pink nose. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, full body shot, one paw extended forward in a welcoming presenter gesture inviting the viewer. On the RIGHT side: a stylized two-path fork-in-the-road scene viewed from above — the left path is narrow and blocked by a glowing red warning barrier sign, the right path is wide and open extending into golden sunlight with a softly glowing golden signpost beside it. A large fork-in-the-road wooden signpost at the junction. Background: deep navy blue gradient sky with golden bokeh sparkles and warm radial glow over the right path. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-right corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with clear path-choice contrast.
